## Summary
What bug does this PR fix?

## Bug description
Short recap of the bug (what was wrong, in one or two sentences).

## Fix
How did you fix it?

## Tests
- [ ] Reproduced the bug before the fix
- [ ] Manual test with nc that reproduces the original bug scenario
- [ ] Manual test with the reference IRC client (when relevant)

## Risks
Could this fix introduce new edge cases or regressions?

## Linked issue
Closes #<issue-number>
